title: Add free transform tool for moving and resizing diagram elements

requirements.summary: Implement a free transform tool that allows users to select and move both icons and their associated text labels together as a single unit on the AttackPathCanvas
acceptanceCriteria: Users can click to select an icon and its text label as a grouped unit
Dragging a selected icon moves both the icon and its text label together
The transform tool maintains the relative position between icon and label during movement
Multiple icons can be moved individually with their respective labels

file_operations.description: Add state management for selected icon/label pairs and tracking which element is currently selected for transform operations. Include functions to select/deselect elements and update positions of grouped icon-label pairs together during drag operations.

Implement selection logic to identify and select icon-text label pairs when clicking on icons. Add drag handlers that move both the icon and its associated text label together while maintaining their relative positions. Integrate with the selection state from useAttackPathState to track the currently selected element.

Add click handler to enable selection of icons for transform operations. Integrate with the parent canvas selection state to visually indicate when an icon is selected. Modify drag behavior to work with the new grouped transform system that moves icons and their labels together.

requirements.summary: Add resize functionality to the free transform tool that allows users to scale icons on the diagram using corner and edge handles
acceptanceCriteria: Selected icons display corner and edge drag handles for resizing
Dragging corner handles resizes icons proportionally
Dragging edge handles resizes icons along one axis
Resized icons maintain their visual quality and aspect ratio when appropriate
The resize functionality preserves the icon's position on the canvas

file_operations.description: Extend Icon type to include width and height properties for storing resize dimensions. Add functions to update icon dimensions during resize operations while preserving position. Ensure undo/redo history captures resize state changes.

Add resize handle rendering for selected icons (corner and edge handles). Implement drag handlers for resize handles that calculate new dimensions based on handle position and drag direction. For corner handles, maintain proportional scaling; for edge handles, scale along one axis only. Update icon dimensions in state during resize operations.

Support dynamic width and height props for rendering icons at custom sizes. Apply CSS transforms or inline styles to scale icons while maintaining visual quality. Ensure resized icons maintain their position anchor point during scaling operations.

requirements.summary: Create visual feedback for the free transform tool showing selection state, including a bounding box or selection outline around selected icons and their labels
acceptanceCriteria: Selected icon and label display a visible selection indicator (bounding box or outline)
Selection state is clearly distinguishable from unselected state
Transform handles are only visible when an element is selected
Users can deselect by clicking on empty canvas area

file_operations.description: Add rendering logic for selection bounding box that encompasses both the icon and its associated text label. Render corner and edge resize handles only when an element is selected. Implement click handler on empty canvas area to deselect the currently selected element. Apply visual styling (border, handles) to indicate selection state.

Add CSS classes for transform tool visual feedback including selection bounding box styles, resize handle styles (corner and edge), and hover states for interactive elements. Use theme-aware colors that work in both light and dark modes.
